candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Based on the figure above, the boiling point of ethyl alcohol under an external pressure of 0.0724 atm is $\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ ℃$.

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The prompt is complete and clearly asks for the temperature at which ethyl alcohol boils under 0.0724 atm. The figure is readable enough to identify the ethanol curve and estimate the corresponding temperature in °C, although solving it requires converting atm to torr and interpolating from the graph.
